summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lucide to Phosphor icons migration across Next.js codebase. All migration requirements verified successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Deprecation warning about middleware file convention - suggests using 'proxy' instead
minor_issues.note: Functional issue, just a naming convention deprecation warning

passed_tests: TypeScript compilation passes (npx tsc --noEmit returns exit code 0)
No remaining imports from 'lucide-react' found in src/ directory
Wrapper file src/lib/icons.tsx exists and exports all required icons
Icon imports working correctly in sample components (meeting-room, arl page, admin page)
All 132+ icon mappings properly configured in wrapper with duotone weight default
